title: We’ve detected an issue with required subscriptions for Microsoft Purview inline data protections in Edge for Business
impact: If not addressed, collection and Data Loss Prevention policies for user data uploads to unmanaged apps may not work.

updates.content:
Title: We’ve detected an issue with required subscriptions for Microsoft Purview inline data protections in Edge for Business  

User impact:  If not addressed, collection and Data Loss Prevention policies for user data uploads to unmanaged apps may not work.

Current Status: We’ve identified through health check activities that a required configuration to activate Microsoft Purview collection and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies in the Edge for Business browser might be missing in your tenant.  

The required Azure subscription to activate collection and DLP policies in the Edge for Business browser might be missing in your tenant. For more information on this feature, review the message center post MC1154787.  

Please review the recommendations provided to prevent any service interruptions.  

This communication will expire in 14 days and remain active for the duration.
